---
name: Tweak request
about: Suggest a new tweak for WinTweak
title: "[TWEAK]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

# What should the tweak be named?
Suggest a name for the tweak here, e.g "Do not do X when I press Y". (A different name will be chosen if the suggested name does not match the standard naming convention for tweaks.)

# Where is the registry key for the tweak?
Specify where the tweak is located in the registry. You can use short names for root keys, e.g HKLM = HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE.

The tweak is located in [...]

# What is the registry value called for the tweak?
Specify what the registry value is called for the tweak in the key you specified above, and its type.

The value is called [...] and it's of type [e.g, REG_DWORD]

# What are the expected values for the registry value?
Specify what values the registry value can accept. For example, if the registry value is of type REG_SZ, specify the values it can be set to, or if it can be set to anything.

# Help text
Write the help text for the tweak when the user calls the help button.

[...]
